EXPLANATION: The paper "Model soups: Averaging weights of multiple fine-tuned models improves accuracy without extra training" is a real, well-cited academic paper published in the proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022). The authors are Mitchell Wortsman, Gabriel Ilharco, Samir Yaqub Gadre, Shuran Song, Ludwig Schmidt, and Ali Farhadi, matching the cited information.
LINK: https://proceedings.mlr.press/v162/wortsman22a.html
FOUND_TITLE: Model soups: Averaging weights of multiple fine-tuned models improves accuracy without extra training
FOUND_AUTHORS: Mitchell Wortsman, Gabriel Ilharco, Samir Yaqub Gadre, Shuran Song, Ludwig Schmidt, Ali Farhadi
FOUND_YEAR: 2022
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
